patient_documents.purpose: Identity-linked clinical paperwork; route to secure patient record storage and restrict broad sharing.
actions: Verify patient identifiers match intake context
File under patient chart or EHR export path
Flag if PHI appears inconsistent with expected visit

lab_results.purpose: Diagnostic lab output used for clinical decisions; treat as high-sensitivity clinical data.
actions: Confirm test panel and dates are legible
Prefer routing to clinical review queue when confidence is borderline
Never merge unrelated patients in downstream automation

prescriptions.purpose: Medication orders and pharmacy-facing documents; errors have direct patient-safety impact.
actions: Check drug name, strength, and sig when text is available
Route ambiguous Rx images to pharmacist or clinician review
Retain originals for audit

imaging.purpose: Radiology and diagnostic imaging paperwork or thumbnails; often paired with reports.
actions: Separate report pages from pure image slices when exporting
Use high priority when study type or laterality is unclear
Defer destructive automation until modality is confirmed

forms.purpose: Administrative and consent forms; important for compliance but usually lower urgency than acute labs.
actions: Index by form type and completion status
Attach to encounter or intake bundle

billing.purpose: Charges, statements, and payment-related documents; financial accuracy matters but not acute care.
actions: Match to account or visit when identifiers exist
Escalate duplicate or conflicting balances to billing ops

insurance.purpose: Coverage, eligibility, and payer correspondence; drives authorization and payment.
actions: Capture member ID and payer when visible
Queue for benefits specialist if policy context is ambiguous

referrals.purpose: Specialty handoffs and external provider requests; timing affects access to care.
actions: Extract referred-to specialty and urgency
Notify care coordination when marked stat or time-sensitive

uncategorized.purpose: Holding bucket for items that do not match a confident type; needs human triage before automation.
actions: Do not auto-route to clinical destinations
Suggest manual label or new reference examples
